TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pushpa Kamal Dahal Pushpa Kamal Dahal (ryax sa 11 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1954 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Nepal ta' misuw hya' ga Pushpa Kamal Dahal, aring ryax tay 26 squ byacing tay 12 sa kawas 2022 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Pushpa Kamal Dahal minkahul sa Pokhara na Nepal. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1954 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' ŚźĄŚúčť†ėŚįéšļļŚąóŤ°® canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: pus~…ēńßpa kamal *ańßal pus~…ēńßpa kamal *ańßal (rjax s~…ēa ** na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēuw ), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw nepal ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a pus~…ēńßpa kamal *ańßal, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral pus~…ēńßpa kamal *ańßal minkańßul s~…ēa pokńßara na nepal. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ******* ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
